metadata.dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block D Carrier Capability and Restrictions
metadata.purpose: Mock/reference carrier capability matrix for Cortex air-mode R&D readiness checks.
metadata.legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. Carrier acceptance changes by station, route, product, contract, commodity, and current regulation. Replace or validate with carrier APIs/contracts/manuals before production use.
metadata.conservative_policy: Use yes only when public carrier sources clearly support capability. Use partial when capability is lane/station/product dependent. Use unknown rather than guessing.
recommended_next_research: Singapore Airlines Cargo direct product capability sheet
FedEx special cargo beyond DG/dry ice
DHL live animals, valuables, human remains

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: DG availability varies by country/service/location. Some locations do not accept DG/dry ice. International restrictions vary for radioactive, explosives, infectious substances, and accessible DG. Live animals should not be assumed accepted from available public evidence.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: FedEx DG country table and DG guide support DG/dry ice as lane/service dependent. Conditions of carriage include live animals as prohibited in some FedEx terms.

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: DG and special cargo depend on DHL business unit, route, approved destination, and service. Strong evidence for pharma/temperature-controlled air freight; less direct evidence for live animals, valuables, and human remains.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: DHL official pages support pharma/temperature-controlled air freight and describe special cargo categories including DG, time/temperature-sensitive cargo and perishables.

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: UPS accepts hazardous materials under air service rules but UPS operator variations are restrictive. UPS Air Cargo DG accepted by contract only according to operator variation source. Some lithium battery and CAO restrictions apply.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: UPS hazardous materials service definition supports DG by air under IATA/ICAO. UPS carrier variation PDF supports contract-only and DG-specific restrictions. UPS air freight guide supports pharma/perishables as use cases but not detailed acceptance.

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: Special cargo accepted only under carrier regulations and station conditions. FAQ lists broad cargo types; DG page requires documentation and specialised handling; specialty page mentions large special cargo such as aircraft engines.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: Emirates SkyCargo official pages explicitly list perishables, DG, pharma, valuables, vulnerable cargo, pets/live animals and specialty/heavy cargo.

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: Product portfolio supports QR Pharma, QR Fresh, QR Live, Express and Charter. DG page exists but route/station acceptance must be confirmed. Valuables evidence is less direct than pharma/fresh/live.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: Qatar Airways Cargo official/press pages support QR Pharma, QR Fresh, QR Live, Express/Charter and DG service page.

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: Official product overview supports DG, active/passive temperature support, valuables, vulnerables, live animals and perishables. Live animal service is subject to availability.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: Lufthansa Cargo product overview and live animal page support broad special-cargo capability.

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: Special cargo pages list TK Pharma, TK Live, TK Fresh, TK Valuable. DG/sensitive cargo should remain approval/station dependent.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: Turkish Cargo official pages support pharma, live animals, fresh, valuable and special cargo.

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: Product portfolio and special facilities support animals, cooling/conditioning, valuables vault and special products. DG and human-remains acceptance should be validated by station/product guide.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: AFKLMP product portfolio PDF supports Animal Hotel, Conditioning Competence Centre, vault and special product capabilities.

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: Cathay Cargo product pages support Pharma, Dangerous Goods, Fresh, Live Animal, Secure, Expert, and Charter services. DG page says all nine classes can be handled; lithium/other DG still needs approval rules and station validation.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: Cathay official product and DG/live-animal pages support broad carrier capability.

carrier_capabilities.known_restrictions: Official evidence is strong for CEIV Pharma and cold-chain containers; direct official product evidence for DG/live animals/valuables was weaker in public search. Use partial/unknown until confirmed.
carrier_capabilities.source_notes: Singapore Airlines official press releases support CEIV Pharma and cold-chain/active container capability; broader special cargo capabilities need manual confirmation.

confidence_rules.message: Dangerous goods require carrier DG acceptance. If carrier DG capability is unknown or no, do not recommend the carrier.
Cargo-aircraft-only cargo requires carrier CAO/freighter capability and station confirmation.
Pharma/temperature-sensitive cargo requires carrier cold-chain product capability.
Perishable cargo requires carrier perishables/fresh-product acceptance and booking confirmation.
Live animal cargo requires explicit carrier live-animal acceptance. Partial or unknown needs manual confirmation.
Valuable/vulnerable cargo requires secure carrier product or station handling confirmation.
Human remains require carrier acceptance and country/station documentation validation.
Heavy/oversized cargo requires carrier heavy cargo/freighter capability plus aircraft fit confirmation.
Carrier-level product capability is not enough; special cargo normally requires station/lane confirmation.
